rationale: The `certutil.exe` utility was used to download an executable from a remote IP (10.0.2.13:8080) to a temporary directory (A0, EV-001). This downloaded executable (`qSwUwejx.exe`) was then immediately executed (EV-002) by the Administrator user. Subsequently, this newly executed process initiated an outbound network connection to a different port (4444) on the same remote IP (10.0.2.13) (EV-003), strongly indicating command and control activity.
